entities.name: SORGHUM BICOLOR
entities.description: The host plant species Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench. used in the study.

entities.name: PANICLE COMPACTNESS
entities.description: The physical density of the sorghum panicle.

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent ability of the sorghum plant to resist insect pests.

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: The insect pest Contarinia sorghicola Coq.

entities.name: HEAD BUGS
entities.description: The insect pest Calocoris angustatus Leth.

entities.name: HEAD CATERPILLAR
entities.description: The insect pest Helicoverpa armigera Hb.

entities.name: POPULATION INCREASE
entities.description: The rate of growth of insect populations over time.

entities.name: SEQUENTIAL SOWINGS
entities.description: The practice of planting crops in a sequence of dates.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which the study was conducted (1985-86).

entities.name: LOOSE PANICLES
entities.description: A specific form of panicle compactness characterized by low density.
